Delivery Times
Hello %name%, thank you for reaching out! All orders take 1-4 business
days to process and ship.
We have several US shipping options:
Flat Rate - shipped with UPS Mail Innovations or UPS Sure Post -
$4.95. Your package will be shipped via UPS and transferred to USPS
for delivery 4-8 business days after shipping.
Flat Rate Priority - $6.95 - shipped with DHL and delivered 3-6 business
days after shipping.
UPS Ground - cost is determined at checkout based on weight and
destination. Arrives in 3-5 business days after shipping. Please note that
these delivery estimates are calculated after the order has shipped.
For orders shipping to Canada, we offer shipping for $7.95 USD via
Canada Post. Your order should arrive 4-8 business days after shipping.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 8 --

We are also happy to ship internationally! Please note that the prices
and *estimated* delivery times are presented at checkout. All orders
shipping outside the U.S. and Canada are subject to customs, duties, or
sales taxes. Due to fluctuating circumstances, shipments may be
delayed upon arriving in your country. Please contact your local
government for more details.

Thank you for your interest in BOOM, %name%! Our shipping carrier
does not deliver to _______________ at this time. We’re sorry for any

evaluating and updating shipping options on our website as they

into a U.S. freight forwarder who can help ship your order to you (our
apologies, but we don’t have any specific companies to recommend). I
will pass your feedback on to the rest of our team.

just tips
Hi %name%, these tips are general and we realize they may not work
for everyone. What matters most is embracing what makes you feel
most happy and beautiful!
Hi %name%, We realize these tips may not be for everyone, but take
what works and leave the rest! Do what makes you feel good!
Hi %name%, these are tips for women who are looking to simplify, or
change up their makeup routine.
Hi %name%, these are tips, not hard rules to live by. We are
encouraging women to think about their day to day routine. What is the
motivation for that cover up? Are you trying to hide or conceal what you
think is flawed, or celebrate the fine lines for what they are? A life well
lived!
Hi %name%, these tips are more about taking a moment and thinking
about your makeup routine. Are you still doing the same routine that you
did 10 or 15 years ago? Maybe it's time to make a few minor
adjustments. Small changes can have some big results, but only if those
results make you happy. Happiness will be your best cosmetic!
loyal customer Hi %name%, we truly appreciate your support and loyalty. We are so
glad to hear that you are enjoying your Boom products 💕

out of stock

plastics
Thank you, %name%! We really appreciate your feedback here. We
love hearing Boom readers care about the earth and our environmental
footprint. At BOOM!, we are always striving to be more eco-conscious.
For example, we recently introduced a sugarcane tube for some of our
products that’s much healthier for the environment than traditional
plastics. We also switched from plastic shrink wrap to a new
compostable seal for our moisturizers. Beyond that, all Boom containers
are 100% recyclable. As we continue to evolve as a brand, we continue
to reimagine our packaging. We appreciate your support while we make
these transitions.
price
Hi %name%, Our prices do reflect the high-quality ingredients we use,
as well as the sustainable agriculture and manufacturing we support.
Please know that if you are not 100% satisfied with your Boom products,
simply let us know and you will receive a full refund less shipping.
